full_prompt: Create a precision machined bracket from a vocational mechanical-drafting CAD brief. The bracket is a representative multi-feature part typical of a vocational CAD problem set: a rectangular body 120 mm x 80 mm x 20 mm with a reamed precision bore of 25 H7 (ISO IT7, bore tolerance +0.021 / 0 mm) on one end and a slot 40 mm x 10 mm with 10 H7 slot width on the other end. The top face carries four counter-bored bolt holes for M8 fasteners; hole-to-hole positional tolerance is 0.05 mm true-position with respect to datums A (bottom face, primary), B (reamed bore axis, secondary), and C (one side face, tertiary). Surface roughness on the reamed bore must be Ra 0.8 um or better; top face Ra 1.6 um; all other machined surfaces Ra 3.2 um. Material is S45C medium-carbon steel (JIS equivalent to AISI 1045), Young's modulus 206 GPa, yield strength 340 MPa. The part will carry a static tensile load of 5 kN applied through the 25 H7 bore pin (bearing pressure on the bore inner surface, 180-degree contact arc) while the four M8 bolt holes are held fully fixed. The maximum von Mises stress under this 5 kN load must stay below 227 MPa (yield/1.5). The CAD model must be a single solid body in STEP AP242 with all GD&T callouts embedded as PMI (product manufacturing information) per ISO 10303-242 AP242 semantic PMI. Scoring is based on dimensional accuracy, tolerance fidelity, and GD&T correctness against the published drawing sheet, which is released post-event. Primary verification is a structural FEA for the 5 kN bore load plus a geometric/tolerance verification step against the target drawing (non-FEA). Vibration, thermal, fluid, and radiation analyses are explicitly NOT required. Deliverables: STEP AP242 with semantic PMI, a report of achieved bore diameter vs 25 H7 band, true-position error of the 4 bolt-hole pattern, and max von Mises under 5 kN bore load.
short_prompt:
Create a precision-machined bracket from a vocational mechanical-drafting CAD brief. Deliver a single solid body in STEP AP242 with semantic PMI per ISO 10303-242. Material is S45C medium-carbon steel (JIS; equivalent AISI 1045).

Envelope: 120 x 80 x 20 mm rectangular body with (a) a reamed 25 H7 (+0.021/0) precision bore on one end, (b) a 40 x 10 mm slot (10 H7 width) on the other end, and (c) four M8 counter-bored top-face bolt holes at 0.05 mm true-position to datums A (bottom), B (bore axis), C (one side). Surface roughness: reamed bore Ra <= 0.8 um; top face Ra <= 1.6 um; other machined surfaces Ra <= 3.2 um.

Load cases.
- LC1 bore pin bearing load: 5,000 N through the 25 H7 bore on a 180-degree contact arc, with the four M8 bolt holes fully fixed. Max von Mises must stay below yield / 1.5.

requires_non_fea_solver.reason: IT7 tolerance band, surface roughness, and true-position checks are geometric tolerance verification, not FEA.

prompt.title: Vocational CAD precision machined bracket
prompt.brief: Create a 120 x 80 x 20 mm S45C bracket with 25 H7 bore, 10 H7 slot, 4x M8 holes on 0.05 mm true-position, ISO IT7, Ra 0.8 on bore; survives 5 kN bore load.

load_cases.name: bore_pin_load_5kN
load_cases.application: bearing on 25 H7 bore, 180 deg arc
